institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Animal Science
tagline: From Lab to Field — Building Tomorrow's Animal Scientists
programDescription: The B.S. in Animal Science prepares students for careers in veterinary medicine, animal production, biomedical research, and agricultural management. Through hands-on laboratory work, livestock management at the University Farm, and undergraduate research opportunities, students develop expertise in animal physiology, nutrition, genetics, and reproductive science. The program's proximity to the Small Farm Research and Innovation Center provides unique field experiences with both large and small animal systems.

careerOutlook.outlook: Animal scientists are essential to advancing food security, veterinary medicine, and biomedical research. HBCU graduates bring critical diversity to agricultural sciences, where minority representation remains historically low.
